description: Faction sigma-leverage is NON-UNIFORM across the faction stat range (armature A6, computed MC). Bare-stat pool => baseline = stat, so sigma-leverage ~ 1/sqrt(stat): 0.354/pt at stat 2 (+17pct vs 0.30 ref) decaying to 0.189/pt at stat 7 (-37pct, OUT OF BAND low). A point of stat buys decaying leverage as the faction strengthens, compounding the post-F2-ruling punching-up wall (strong rivals hard to act on AND strong-faction stat investment leverage-poor). Distinct from ED-868 (collapse loops) and the artifact-error ED-865/866; this is the underlying attribute-economy property. Aggregating the faction pool (cf. mass-battle ER-9) flattens it. STAGE-4 TESTED: sigma-leverage non-uniformity is NOT fixable by pool aggregation - sigma-leverage ~ 1/sqrt(baseline) is irreducibly non-uniform for any dice pool (flat-agg narrows spread 0.165->0.053 but pushes leverage below band; x2 mult makes low-stat too high, spread 0.233). Only a deterministic+stochastic resolver (constant leverage = slope by construction) fixes it. Strengthens the deterministic+stochastic option on the sigma-leverage dimension specifically.

Mass-battle Command sigma-leverage is HIGH at low Command (armature A6, computed): 0.500/pt at Cmd 2 decaying to in-band at Cmd 4-7. Low-Command early-game generals get oversized per-point leverage. Closes attribute_weight_standard GAP #2 (was magnitude-unverified). Same 1/sqrt(baseline) mechanism as ED-874; non-uniform across range.

RESOLVED-APPLIED to canon 2026-05-28 (commit 2327adc4). Trigger-5 firing is NON-MONOTONIC in faction strength because Condition C stacks a pool-size cliff (pool >= 6) onto a magnitude threshold (net <= -2). Computed firing rate by defender pool (recovery-independent MC): Cmd-1 (2D)=0pct [Cond A blocks], Cmd-2 (4D)=1.9pct [needs rare net<=-2], Cmd-3 (6D)=16.6pct [pool>=6 auto-fires C on ANY failure], declining to ~8pct for strong factions. A single Command point (Cmd 2->3) jumps battle->Stability exposure 8.7x. Mid-tier factions are MOST exposed to battle-driven Stability loss; the weakest are shielded. Consider smoothing C (e.g. severity scaled by margin rather than a hard pool>=6 auto-fire). Corrects the earlier hand-traced assumption that weak-faction battles drive a deterministic Stability spiral (CC-2). STRENGTHENED (CC-5): with the canonical Institutional Consolidation recovery, the cliff propagates to COLLAPSE — compound collapse jumps ~25x from Cmd 2 (0.9pct) to Cmd 3 (22.6pct), declining at Cmd 4 (18.6pct), because a fired Trigger-5 denies the deterministic clean-season +1 recovery. A single Command point swinging collapse 25x is a robustness defect -> P1. STAGE-4 TESTED (sim_faction_remediation): Fix-A = remove the pool>=6 clause from Condition C's GATE (keep it in the COST table). Firing curve goes monotonic/flat (~1-2pct, Cmd-3 spike removed) and 100pct of genuine routs (net<=-2) are still punished; only disciplined net 0/-1 large-force withdrawals are spared (matches canon intent). Recommend apply. Independent of the ED-865/874 resolver fork.
jordan_decision: Fix-A applied per Jordan instruction; faction_layer_v30 §0 + Trigger-5 patched; canonical_sources SHA refreshed

description: RESOLVED (was UNREAD, not absent). The faction Stability-recovery mechanic EXISTS: faction_layer_v30 §1.3 Institutional Consolidation = DETERMINISTIC +1 Stability on any Trigger-1-5-free ('clean') season; canon explicitly states it 'replaces the abstract simulator recovery rule.' Conditional paths: peace treaty, recapture territory, Parliamentary Overwhelming, Church Absolution, Lowenritter endorsement; seasonal cap +-2. §1.4 Accounting Stability Check is a cascade-DAMAGE check (fires only on >=2 attr-pts lost), not recovery. Compound sim re-run with this canonical mechanic; SANITY passes; collapse magnitudes now trustworthy. Do NOT file as an open gap.

Threadwork FR (Lock/Dissolution) Coherence surcharge contradiction (T2). threadwork_v30 §3.2 base table: FR Lock/Dissolution any scale = -1 additional, Lock/Dissolution minimum total -2. Same section PP-196 PROVISIONAL revises to -1 total at Object/Personal (FR surcharge only, scale cost 0). Both values in current canon side-by-side. Decide: ratify PP-196 (update base table) or strike PP-196 (preserve -2 minimum).

Combat secondary consistency items (consolidated, C3/C5/C6). C3: out-of-bounds x Pool-Floor-5 interaction underspecified (does the floor apply when a combatant is pushed OOB?). C5: Health super-linear at low Endurance via (End+6)(MW+1) MW step (now also captured quantitatively in ED-826 + the I-1 win-rate refinement below). C6: Strength damage-multiplier vs Power terminology ambiguity. Combat is mechanically sound (NERS PASS); these are clarity/consistency, not balance.

RESOLVED-APPLIED 2026-05-29. faction_layer §Varfell and params/bg/core asserted 'Varfell expansion is purely military / does not convert populations ideologically' — the rationale for the 2026-04-19 Cultural REFORMATION strike (VTM-dependent action; VTM was a placeholder, validly struck). But the Conviction-Track redesign (conviction_track_v30) reintroduced the ideological-conversion capability VTM-FREE as Cultural RECLAMATION (Varfell: Influence vs Ob 2, target-territory Piety -1 toward Einhir Restoration pole). The stale 'purely military' prose was never reconciled. Per Jordan 2026-05-29: Varfell takes ALL universal faction actions and has Cultural Reclamation as a non-military Piety-ALIGNMENT vector (NOT a control transfer, NOT a victory path). Reconciled the prose in faction_layer_v30 §Varfell + params/bg/core (L5 comment + L226 row) toward the live mechanic; Reformation + VTM remain struck. SOLE victory condition remains Peninsular Sovereignty (GD-1) — no faction-specific/religious/non-military victory path. Documentation reconciliation; no mechanical change (Cultural Reclamation was already live).
affected_docs: canon/supersession_register.yaml (CR-STRIKE/VTM entries still carry the historical 'purely military' rationale — flagged for editorial owner to add a forward-pointer to ED-880; not edited here to preserve the audit trail)
source: Jordan flag 2026-05-29; repo investigation (conviction_track_v30 Cultural Reclamation)
jordan_decision: reconcile toward live Cultural Reclamation; Reformation/VTM stay struck; Piety-alignment only (no control, no victory); peninsula sole victory (GD-1)
